hero.headline: Architecture, Design & Consultancy
hero.subheadline: Design, engineering, and project management — serving clients across the MENA region since 2013.

trust.description: Architecture, interiors, engineering, and construction oversight — a single studio, delivering across the MENA region since 2013.

services.title: What We Do
services.heading: Architecture, under one vision.
services.description: Design, interiors, engineering, and construction oversight — each discipline connected through a single studio vision. Every project moves through our hands from the first sketch through final delivery, ensuring nothing is lost between intent and reality.
services.subtitle: Architecture, design, engineering, and project management — delivered from Qatar.

architectural-design.title: Architectural Design
architectural-design.summary: From concept to construction documents, we deliver visionary architectural designs that respond to site, climate, and culture.
architectural-design.body: At Green Studio Qatar, our architectural design practice is rooted in a deep understanding of the MENA region's unique environmental and cultural context. We create buildings that are not only visually striking but also performant, sustainable, and deeply connected to their surroundings. Our design process is collaborative, iterative, and data-informed, ensuring every project achieves its fullest potential.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Initial design exploration including massing studies, site analysis, and conceptual diagrams.
deliverables.descriptionAr: استكشاف التصميم الأولي بما في ذلك دراسات الكتلة وتحليل الموقع والرسوم البيانية المفاهيمية.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Refined design with floor plans, elevations, sections, and preliminary material selections.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تصميم محسّن مع مخططات الطوابق والواجهات والقطاعات واختيارات المواد الأولية.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Detailed architectural drawings with coordinated structural and MEP systems.
deliverables.descriptionAr: رسومات معمارية مفصلة مع أنظمة هيكلية وميكانيكية وكهربائية وسباكة منسقة.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Comprehensive permit and construction sets including specifications and schedules.
deliverables.descriptionAr: مجموعات شاملة لتصاريح البناء والإنشاءات تشمل المواصفات والجداول.

faqs.questionEn: What is the typical timeline for an architectural design project?
faqs.questionAr: ما هو الجدول الزمني النموذجي لمشروع التصميم المعماري؟
faqs.answerEn: Depending on scale and complexity, a full architectural design process typically takes 4-12 months from concept to construction documents.
faqs.answerAr: اعتمادًا على الحجم والتعقيد، تستغرق عملية التصميم المعماري الكاملة عادةً من 4 إلى 12 شهرًا من المفهوم إلى وثائق البناء.

faqs.questionEn: Do you offer sustainable design solutions?
faqs.answerEn: Yes. Sustainability is core to our practice. We integrate passive design strategies, local materials, and energy-efficient systems into every project.
faqs.answerAr: نعم. الاستدامة هي جوهر ممارستنا. ندمج استراتيجيات التصميم السلبي والمواد المحلية والأنظمة الموفرة للطاقة في كل مشروع.

interior-design.title: Interior Design
interior-design.summary: Spatial experiences that blend contemporary aesthetics with regional craftsmanship.
interior-design.body: Our interior design practice transforms spaces into immersive environments. We draw inspiration from the rich textile traditions, geometric patterns, and material palettes of the Arab world, reinterpreted through a contemporary lens. Every finish, furnishing, and detail is carefully curated to create harmony between form and function.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Mood boards, material palettes, and spatial planning.
deliverables.descriptionAr: لوحات المزاج ولوحات المواد والتخطيط المكاني.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Detailed drawings, FF&E schedules, and custom millwork designs.
deliverables.descriptionAr: رسومات مفصلة وجداول الأثاث والتجهيزات وتصاميم النجارة المخصصة.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Interior construction packages including finishes, lighting, and joinery.
deliverables.descriptionAr: حزم البناء الداخلي تشمل التشطيبات والإضاءة والنجارة.

deliverables.descriptionEn: On-site supervision during installation and styling.
deliverables.descriptionAr: الإشراف في الموقع أثناء التركيب والتنسيق.

faqs.questionEn: Do you work on both residential and commercial interiors?
faqs.questionAr: هل تعملون في المساحات الداخلية السكنية والتجارية؟
faqs.answerEn: Absolutely. We handle a wide range of interior typologies including private residences, offices, hospitality venues, and retail spaces.
faqs.answerAr: بالتأكيد. نتعامل مع مجموعة واسعة من أنواع المساحات الداخلية بما في ذلك المساكن الخاصة والمكاتب ومرافق الضيافة والمساحات التجارية.

engineering-consultancy.title: Engineering Consultancy
engineering-consultancy.summary: Structural, civil, and MEP engineering services that ensure safety, efficiency, and constructability.
engineering-consultancy.body: Our engineering consultancy team provides expert analysis and design across structural, civil, and MEP disciplines. We leverage advanced simulation tools and deep local knowledge to deliver engineering solutions that are both innovative and practical. From tall towers in Doha to complex infrastructure projects, our work ensures every building stands on a foundation of technical excellence.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Structural analysis, framing design, and foundation engineering.
deliverables.descriptionAr: التحليل الإنشائي وتصميم الإطارات وهندسة الأساسات.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing system design.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تصميم الأنظمة الميكانيكية والكهربائية وأنظمة السباكة.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Site grading, drainage, and utility design.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تسوية الموقع وتصريف المياه وتصميم المرافق.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Cost optimization without compromising quality or performance.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تحسين التكاليف دون المساس بالجودة أو الأداء.

faqs.questionEn: Which engineering software do you use?
faqs.questionAr: ما هي برامج الهندسة التي تستخدمونها؟
faqs.answerEn: We use industry-standard tools including ETABS, SAP2000, SAFE, Revit, Robot Structural Analysis, and AutoCAD MEP.
faqs.answerAr: نستخدم أدوات قياسية في المجال بما في ذلك ETABS و SAP2000 و SAFE و Revit و Robot Structural Analysis و AutoCAD MEP.

project-management.title: Project Management
project-management.summary: End-to-end project management from feasibility through handover, keeping your project on time and on budget.
project-management.body: We manage projects with the precision and care they deserve. Our project management team oversees every phase — from initial feasibility studies and budgeting through procurement, construction, and final handover. With deep experience in the MENA construction market, we anticipate risks before they materialize and keep stakeholders aligned throughout the project lifecycle.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Site evaluation, market analysis, and financial modeling.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تقييم الموقع وتحليل السوق والنمذجة المالية.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Detailed cost estimates, value engineering, and expense tracking.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تقديرات التكلفة التفصيلية والهندسة القيمية وتتبع النفقات.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Tendering, contractor selection, and contract administration.
deliverables.descriptionAr: المناقصات واختيار المقاولين وإدارة العقود.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Schedule management, quality control, and progress reporting.
deliverables.descriptionAr: إدارة الجدول الزمني ومراقبة الجودة وتقارير التقدم.

faqs.questionEn: What project management methodology do you use?
faqs.questionAr: ما هي منهجية إدارة المشاريع التي تستخدمونها؟
faqs.answerEn: We follow PMI standards with a tailored approach for construction projects, using tools like Primavera P6 and MS Project.
faqs.answerAr: نتبع معايير معهد إدارة المشاريع مع نهج مخصص لمشاريع البناء، باستخدام أدوات مثل Primavera P6 و MS Project.

construction-supervision.title: Construction Supervision
construction-supervision.summary: On-site supervision ensuring design intent is faithfully executed to the highest quality standards.
construction-supervision.body: Great design deserves great execution. Our construction supervision team provides dedicated on-site representation to ensure that every element of the design is built exactly as intended. We conduct regular inspections, review submittals, coordinate with contractors, and provide detailed progress reports — safeguarding quality, schedule, and budget throughout the construction phase.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Regular site visits and inspection reports.
deliverables.descriptionAr: زيارات دورية للموقع وتقارير التفتيش.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Material testing, workmanship verification, and compliance checks.
deliverables.descriptionAr: اختبار المواد والتحقق من جودة التنفيذ وفحوص الامتثال.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Weekly and monthly progress reports with photographic documentation.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تقارير أسبوعية وشهرية عن التقدم مع توثيق بالصور.

deliverables.descriptionEn: Defect identification, punch list management, and final handover.
deliverables.descriptionAr: تحديد العيوب وإدارة قائمة الملاحظات والتسليم النهائي.

faqs.questionEn: Do you provide supervision for projects not originally designed by you?
faqs.questionAr: هل تقدمون الإشراف للمشاريع التي لم تصمموها في الأصل؟
faqs.answerEn: Yes. We frequently serve as supervision consultant on projects designed by other firms, bringing our quality assurance expertise to any project.
faqs.answerAr: نعم. نعمل في كثير من الأحيان كمستشار إشراف في مشاريع صممتها مكاتب أخرى، ونقدم خبرتنا في ضمان الجودة لأي مشروع.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: A curated selection of our work across the MENA region.

about.title: About Green Studio
about.subtitle: Architecture, design, and consultancy from Qatar — established 2013.
about.story: Green Studio for Design and Consultancy was established in 2013 in Qatar. We provide architectural design, interior design, engineering consultancy, and project management services. Our work is grounded in technical expertise and a commitment to delivering projects that meet the needs of our clients and communities.
about.mission: To deliver professional architecture and design services of the highest quality, grounded in technical competence and client-focused practice.
about.vision: To be a trusted design and consultancy firm in Qatar, recognized for professional integrity and quality delivery.

values.title: Professionalism
values.description: We uphold the highest standards of professional conduct and technical competence in every project.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We are honest and transparent in our dealings with clients, partners, and communities.

values.title: Quality
values.description: We are committed to delivering work that meets or exceeds industry standards.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: We work closely with clients and consultants to achieve the best outcomes for every project.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We integrate responsible design practices into our work.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A collaborative, transparent process from concept to completion.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We begin by understanding your vision, site, and goals through in-depth consultation and research.

steps.title: Concept Design
steps.description: We translate insights into design concepts, exploring massing, materiality, and spatial organization.

steps.title: Design Development
steps.description: We refine the selected concept into detailed drawings and specifications, coordinating all disciplines.

steps.title: Documentation & Permitting
steps.description: We prepare comprehensive construction documents and navigate the permitting process.

steps.title: Construction Oversight
steps.description: We provide on-site supervision to ensure the design is executed with precision and quality.

steps.title: Handover & Beyond
steps.description: We complete snagging, assist with occupancy, and remain available for post-occupancy support.

seo.defaultDescriptionAr: عمارة وتصميم داخلي واستشارات هندسية وإدارة مشاريع من قطر. تأسس عام 2013.

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Thoughts on architecture, design, and the built environment in the MENA region.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Design guided by purpose, place, and people.
philosophy.intro: At Green Studio Qatar, we believe architecture is more than building — it is an act of cultural expression, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility. Our philosophy is rooted in three pillars:
philosophy.p1: Every project begins with a deep reading of its context — the climate, the landscape, the urban fabric, and the cultural DNA of the place. We design with, not against, our environment.
philosophy.p2: We see sustainability not as a checklist but as a design ethos. From passive cooling strategies to material selection, every decision is made with the long-term health of the planet in mind.
philosophy.p3: Great architecture is felt before it is seen. We prioritize the human experience — light, proportion, materiality, and the sensory qualities that make a space come alive.
philosophy.pullQuote: Architecture is the thoughtful making of space.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: We are always looking for talented individuals who share our passion for design excellence.
careers.noOpenings: No current openings. Please check back later or send your CV to careers@greenstudioqatar.com.

packages.title: Our Packages
packages.subtitle: Every project is unique. These engagement options provide a starting point for discussion.
packages.customQuote: Every project is unique — contact us for a tailored proposal based on your specific requirements.

cta.headline: Every great building begins with a conversation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Green Studio Qatar respects your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide through our contact and consultation forms, including your name, email, phone number, and project details.
privacy.section2Body: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiries, provide services, and improve our offerings. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.section3Body: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information. However, no internet transmission is completely secure.
privacy.section4Body: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at info@greenstudioqatar.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the Green Studio Qatar website and services, you agree to these terms.
terms.section1Body: All services are provided under a separate written agreement. Website content is for informational purposes only.
terms.section2Body: All project images, designs, and content on this website are the intellectual property of Green Studio Qatar unless otherwise noted.
terms.section3Body: Green Studio Qatar shall not be held liable for any damages arising from the use of this website.
terms.section4Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Qatar.
